mentors.name: Sarah Coleman
mentors.headline: Growth Marketing Lead for B2B SaaS
mentors.bio: Sarah has spent the last decade helping B2B SaaS startups scale from pre-seed to Series C using data-driven acquisition, conversion rate optimization, and lifecycle marketing. She specializes in building sustainable growth engines with clear experimentation roadmaps.

mentors.name: David Kim
mentors.headline: Product Strategist & Former Head of Product
mentors.bio: David has led product teams in fintech and marketplace startups, focusing on outcome-driven roadmapping, discovery practices, and cross-functional alignment between product, design, and engineering.

mentors.name: Elena Rossi
mentors.headline: Brand & Performance Marketing for Early-Stage Startups
mentors.bio: Elena blends brand storytelling with performance channels to help founders clarify positioning, design full-funnel campaigns, and measure what actually drives efficient growth.

mentors.name: Mohammed Al-Farouq
mentors.headline: Fundraising Advisor for Seed & Series A
mentors.bio: Mohammed has supported 60+ startups through seed and Series A rounds, helping them refine narrative, structure data rooms, and run efficient investor pipelines.

mentors.name: Hannah Lee
mentors.headline: UX/UI Designer for SaaS & Mobile Apps
mentors.bio: Hannah is a senior product designer focusing on user-centric discovery, information architecture, and high-fidelity prototyping for SaaS dashboards and consumer apps.

mentors.name: James O'Connor
mentors.headline: Startup Operations & Scaling Playbooks
mentors.bio: James specializes in building operational foundations for seed to Series B startups: OKRs, process mapping, hiring frameworks, and cross-team collaboration practices.

mentors.name: Priya Nair
mentors.headline: Go-To-Market & Growth for SaaS and Marketplaces
mentors.bio: Priya helps founders craft go-to-market strategies, refine ICPs, and design repeatable outbound and inbound playbooks that align sales, marketing, and product.

mentors.name: Luis Fernandez
mentors.headline: Full-Stack Engineering Leader
mentors.bio: Luis is a senior engineer who has led teams building scalable web platforms. He mentors on architecture decisions, technical roadmaps, and balancing speed with quality.

mentors.name: Anna Kovács
mentors.headline: Innovation Strategy & Corporate-Startup Collaboration
mentors.bio: Anna advises both startups and corporates on innovation strategy, partnership models, and validating new business lines using lean experimentation.

mentors.name: Michael Chen
mentors.headline: Early-Stage Generalist Mentor & Former Founder
mentors.bio: Michael founded and exited a B2C marketplace and now mentors early-stage teams on prioritization, early traction, and avoiding common founder pitfalls.

mentors.name: Claire Dubois
mentors.headline: Brand Marketing & Community Building
mentors.bio: Claire works with consumer and impact startups to build authentic brands, communities, and launch campaigns that convert early adopters into advocates.

mentors.name: Ravi Patel
mentors.headline: Data-Driven Growth & Experimentation
mentors.bio: Ravi helps teams instrument analytics, design experiments, and interpret data to drive sustainable growth across product and marketing funnels.

mentors.name: Sophia Martinez
mentors.headline: Product & UX for AI-Driven Products
mentors.bio: Sophia works at the intersection of product management and UX for AI/ML products, focusing on explainability, user trust, and translating complex tech into simple experiences.

mentors.name: Jonas Berg
mentors.headline: Operations & Growth for Remote Teams
mentors.bio: Jonas focuses on setting up processes, tools, and rituals for fully remote startups, covering async communication, documentation, and performance management.

mentors.name: Lina Ahmed
mentors.headline: Strategic Designer for Service & Product Innovation
mentors.bio: Lina combines service design and strategic design to help organizations rethink end-to-end experiences and test new value propositions quickly.

mentors.name: Tomáš Novák
mentors.headline: Startup Strategy & Fundraising Readiness
mentors.bio: Tomáš mentors founders on sharpening their strategy, understanding investor expectations, and preparing clear, data-backed fundraising narratives.

resources.title: Pitch Deck Teardown: Seed Round Example
resources.description: A slide-by-slide breakdown of a successful seed-stage pitch deck, with commentary on what worked, what didn’t, and how to adapt the structure for your own startup.
resources.author: Elena Rossi

resources.title: 10 Slides Every Investor Expects to See
resources.description: A concise guide to the essential slides investors look for in early-stage pitch decks, including examples and anti-patterns to avoid.
resources.author: Mohammed Al-Farouq

resources.title: Video: How to Tell Your Startup Story in 5 Minutes
resources.description: A practical video walkthrough on crafting a compelling narrative arc for your pitch, including hook, problem, solution, and traction.
resources.author: Michael Chen

resources.title: Designing Investor-Friendly Financial Slides
resources.description: Learn how to present your metrics, unit economics, and financial projections in a way that investors can quickly understand and trust.
resources.author: Tomáš Novák

resources.title: Pitch Deck Template for Seed-Stage Startups (Google Slides)
resources.description: A ready-to-use pitch deck template with slide prompts for problem, solution, traction, business model, and financials.
resources.author: Innovation Hub Team

resources.title: Fundraising 101: From Idea to Seed Round
resources.description: An overview of the early fundraising journey, including when to raise, how much to raise, and how to run a structured fundraising process.
resources.author: Mohammed Al-Farouq

resources.title: Innovation Playbook: From Corporate Brief to Tested MVP
resources.description: A step-by-step guide for innovation teams to move from a high-level corporate brief to a validated MVP using lean experimentation.
resources.author: Anna Kovács

resources.title: Landing Page Optimization for Startup Launches
resources.description: Practical tips to improve your landing page conversion rate before a launch, including messaging, layout, and A/B testing ideas.
resources.author: Sarah Coleman

resources.title: Product Discovery in 4 Weeks: A Lightweight Process
resources.description: A practical framework for early-stage product discovery, including interviews, prototypes, and validating problem–solution fit quickly.
resources.author: David Kim

resources.title: Podcast: Stories from Failed Pitches (and What We Learned)
resources.description: Founders and investors share candid stories about pitch meetings that went wrong, with lessons on what to do differently next time.
resources.author: Innovation Hub Media

resources.title: One-Page Lean Canvas Template
resources.description: A fillable one-page lean canvas to clarify your problem, solution, customer segments, and unfair advantage.
resources.author: Innovation Hub Team

resources.title: Video: How to Handle Q&A After Your Pitch
resources.description: Tactics for managing tough investor questions, staying on message, and using Q&A to reinforce confidence in your startup.
resources.author: Michael Chen

resources.title: Checklist: Is Your Pitch Deck Investor-Ready?
resources.description: A quick checklist to review your pitch deck before sending it to investors, covering clarity, metrics, and narrative flow.
resources.author: Claire Dubois

resources.title: Community-Led Growth: Turning Users into Advocates
resources.description: How to design and grow a product community that drives acquisition, retention, and product feedback loops.
resources.author: Claire Dubois

resources.title: Operations Playbook for Remote Startup Teams
resources.description: Recommended rituals, tools, and processes for running a high-performing remote startup team.
resources.author: James O'Connor

resources.title: Micro-Experiments to Improve Pitch Deck Clarity
resources.description: Simple experiments you can run with your existing deck to validate whether your core story and metrics are landing with your audience.
resources.author: Ravi Patel

resources.title: Video: Visual Design Tips for Cleaner Pitch Slides
resources.description: Quick visual design principles to make your pitch deck more readable and professional without hiring a designer.
resources.author: Hannah Lee

resources.title: From Feature List to Compelling Product Narrative
resources.description: How to translate your roadmap into a narrative that resonates with both users and investors.
resources.author: Sophia Martinez

program_applications.one_sentence_pitch: AI-powered workflow analytics that helps remote teams spot bottlenecks and improve collaboration in real time.
program_applications.other_answers: Founding team has worked together for 2 years; currently at $8k MRR with 6 pilot customers.

program_applications.one_sentence_pitch: A compliance co-pilot for fintech startups that automates KYC checks and risk scoring using explainable AI.
program_applications.other_answers: Bootstrapped to date; 3 design partners in the UK and Germany testing the product.

program_applications.one_sentence_pitch: A circular-economy marketplace that helps local retailers offer reusable packaging with deposit-free returns.
program_applications.other_answers: No funding raised yet; founders have logistics and retail backgrounds.

program_applications.one_sentence_pitch: A collaborative whiteboard tailored for hardware teams to align CAD, specs, and experiments in one place.
program_applications.other_answers: Currently at idea/prototype stage; looking for support with fundraising basics and pilot introductions.

programs.name: Berlin FinTech Seed Accelerator
programs.description: A 4-month in-person accelerator for European FinTech startups focusing on B2B payments, compliance, and infrastructure. Includes access to banking partners and a dedicated fundraising mentor network.
programs.benefits: €80K in funding, weekly mentor office hours, investor day in Berlin, and access to banking sandbox APIs.

programs.name: Remote-First Seed Program Europe
programs.description: A fully remote 3-month accelerator for pre-seed and seed startups across Europe, optimized for distributed teams building SaaS and marketplace products.
programs.benefits: $60K in funding, async-friendly programming, 1:1 mentorship, and access to a Europe-wide investor network.

programs.name: Global Pre-Accelerator Bootcamp
programs.description: A 6-week online pre-accelerator helping very early-stage founders validate ideas, test assumptions, and prepare for their first accelerator or pre-seed round.
programs.benefits: No equity, structured curriculum, weekly group coaching, and investor-readiness feedback.

programs.name: City Innovation Lab Incubator
programs.description: A 9-month local incubator program for early-stage founders building impactful products in climate, mobility, and civic tech.
programs.benefits: Local mentorship, office space, small non-dilutive grants, and access to municipal partners for pilots.

programs.name: Lisbon Seed Sprint
programs.description: An intensive 6-month seed accelerator for digital startups targeting EU markets, with a strong focus on go-to-market and fundraising.
programs.benefits: €100K investment, dedicated GTM advisor, demo day with 100+ investors, and co-working membership for the duration.

programs.name: London FinTech Founders Lab
programs.description: A pre-seed lab backing technical FinTech founders with deep domain mentorship from banks, regulators, and experienced operators.
programs.benefits: £75K pre-seed investment, regulatory clinics, and warm intros to UK seed funds.

programs.name: Valley Scale Seed Program
programs.description: A 4-month Silicon Valley seed accelerator for high-growth SaaS companies ready to scale sales and fundraising globally.
programs.benefits: $150K investment, US market entry support, and access to a network of 200+ alumni companies.

programs.name: NYC Urban Innovation Studio
programs.description: A multi-stage innovation studio partnering with city agencies to pilot urban-tech solutions in transportation, housing, and civic engagement.
programs.benefits: Pilot opportunities with city agencies, co-creation workshops, and follow-on funding for successful pilots.

programs.name: Singapore ASEAN Seed Launchpad
programs.description: A seed-stage accelerator helping startups launch and scale across ASEAN markets with regional corporate partners.
programs.benefits: SGD 120K investment, market access trips, and joint pilots with corporate partners.

programs.name: Mexico City Pre-Seed Founders Fellowship
programs.description: A founder-first program supporting Latin American entrepreneurs at the idea and prototype stage with stipends and hands-on coaching.
programs.benefits: Monthly stipends, access to shared workspace, and a structured curriculum for idea validation.

programs.name: Nairobi Impact Seed Program
programs.description: A seed accelerator backing impact-focused startups improving access to finance, energy, and essential services across Africa.
programs.benefits: $75K seed funding, tailored impact measurement support, and regional investor demo day.

programs.name: Dubai Web3 & FinTech Sandbox
programs.description: A pre-seed program offering regulatory sandboxes and mentorship for founders building in Web3 and FinTech across MENA.
programs.benefits: Regulatory sandbox access, office space in Dubai, and connections to regional VCs and banks.

programs.name: Global Climate Innovation Accelerator
programs.description: A multi-stage, fully remote accelerator for climate-tech startups working on energy, mobility, and carbon management.
programs.benefits: $100K investment, domain-specific mentors, and introductions to climate-focused funds and corporates.

programs.name: Nordic HealthTech Pre-Seed Studio
programs.description: A design-heavy pre-seed studio supporting healthtech founders with clinical validation, UX research, and regulatory navigation in the EU.
programs.benefits: Clinical partnerships in the Nordics, in-house design team, and support through CE marking pathways.

events.name: Innovation Week 2026
events.description: A 4-day multi-track event bringing together founders, investors, and mentors across fintech, AI, and climate innovation. Includes keynotes, workshops, and curated 1:1 meetings.
events.address: 221B Baker Street, London NW1 6XE, United Kingdom

events.name: City AI Hackathon 2026
events.description: A 36-hour hackathon in Berlin focused on AI-powered solutions for urban mobility, fintech, and public services. Includes mentor support and a dedicated team builder.

events.name: Berlin FinTech Networking Mixer
events.description: An informal after-work mixer for fintech founders, operators, and investors in Berlin. Short lightning intros followed by open networking.

events.name: London FinTech Afterwork Meetup
events.description: Casual afterwork drinks for early-stage fintech founders and product leaders to share learnings on payments, compliance, and fundraising.
events.address: 12 Curtain Road, London EC2A 3NQ, United Kingdom

events.name: FinTech Founders Social Amsterdam
events.description: A curated social evening for fintech founders and senior operators in Amsterdam, with hosted introductions by the organizer.

events.name: Webinar: Using AI to Optimize Your Marketing Funnel
events.description: A 90-minute live webinar on practical ways to use AI for segmentation, creative testing, and lifecycle marketing.
events.address: Online event (Zoom link provided after registration)

events.name: Pitch Deck Review Clinic (Online)
events.description: A small-group workshop where founders get live feedback on their pitch decks from fundraising mentors.
events.address: Online event (video conference link shared on confirmation)

events.name: Coworking & Innovation Hub Open Day
events.description: Tour the coworking space, try hot desks for a day, and join a short networking session with resident startups.

events.name: HealthTech Product Roundtable
events.description: An invite-only roundtable for healthtech founders and product leaders to discuss EU regulations and patient-centric design.

events.name: Founders Breakfast: Building Remote Teams
events.description: A small breakfast meetup for founders to share practical tactics for building and scaling remote-first teams.

events.name: FinTech Demo Day Berlin
events.description: Demo day showcasing 12 early-stage fintech startups pitching to a room of European investors and partners.

events.name: Climate Innovation Summit 2026
events.description: A 2-day summit bringing together climate-tech founders, policymakers, and corporates to explore scalable solutions.

events.name: Fundraising Bootcamp: From Story to Data Room
events.description: An in-person, hands-on bootcamp for seed-stage founders to refine their fundraising narrative, deck, and data room.
events.address: Rua do Instituto Industrial 16, 1200-225 Lisbon, Portugal

events.name: Remote AI Hack Night
events.description: A 6-hour online hack night for builders experimenting with small AI projects, with optional team formation and live mentor support.

coworking_plans.name: Weekend Creator Pass (Berlin)
coworking_plans.description: Affordable weekend access for solo founders who need a focused space on Saturdays and Sundays, plus a small monthly allowance of meeting room time.

coworking_plans.name: Hot Desk Lite (Berlin)
coworking_plans.description: Flexible hot-desk membership with access on business days and a limited pool of meeting room hours for occasional client calls.

coworking_plans.name: Hot Desk Plus (Berlin)
coworking_plans.description: Popular hot-desk plan for early-stage founders, with extended access hours and a generous block of meeting room credits each month.

coworking_plans.name: Startup Team Desk (Berlin)
coworking_plans.description: A bundle for small startup teams with shared hot desks, meeting room credits for weekly standups, and access to founder-only events.

coworking_plans.name: Dedicated Desk Pro (Berlin)
coworking_plans.description: Your own fixed desk in the main coworking area, with additional meeting room hours suitable for frequent client calls and internal sessions.

coworking_plans.name: Private Office for 4 (Berlin)
coworking_plans.description: Enclosed, lockable office for teams up to 4, with ample meeting room hours for weekly planning, sales calls, and board meetings.

coworking_plans.name: Hot Desk Flex (London)
coworking_plans.description: Flexible hot-desk membership in our Shoreditch hub, ideal for solo founders commuting a few days per week.

coworking_plans.name: Dedicated Desk (London)
coworking_plans.description: Fixed desk in the London hub with extended access and a generous allocation of meeting room time for growing teams.

coworking_plans.name: Hot Desk Hub (Lisbon)
coworking_plans.description: Sunny hot-desk space in our Lisbon hub with community events and day-time access, ideal for digital nomads and early-stage teams.

coworking_plans.name: Private Office for 6 (Lisbon)
coworking_plans.description: Spacious private office for growing teams, with meeting room credits suited for frequent stakeholder reviews and sprint planning.

coworking_plans.name: Virtual Office Global
coworking_plans.description: Remote-friendly plan with a business address, mail handling, and occasional day passes for on-site work, but no meeting room allocation.

coworking_plans.name: Remote Team Virtual Plus
coworking_plans.description: Virtual membership for distributed teams including a pool of day passes each month; meeting rooms can be booked pay-as-you-go.

coworking_plans.name: Weekday Flex (Berlin)
coworking_plans.description: Weekday-only hot-desk access for budget-conscious founders; meeting rooms available on a pay-per-use basis.

communities.name: AI Founders Global
communities.description: A global community for founders building AI-first products, from applied ML tools to foundation model wrappers. Members share benchmarks, growth tactics, and technical best practices.

communities.name: FinTech Builders Europe
communities.description: Product, engineering, and ops leaders building the next generation of European fintech products in payments, lending, and infrastructure.

communities.name: HealthTech Product Leaders
communities.description: A focused group for product managers and founders working on digital health, patient experience, and clinical workflow tools across Europe and North America.

communities.name: Pitch Deck Feedback Clinic
communities.description: Peer and mentor-led feedback sessions on investor pitch decks, including narrative, metrics, and design critique for pre-seed and seed founders.

communities.name: Growth Marketing Guild
communities.description: A guild of performance and lifecycle marketers sharing experiments, channel breakdowns, and playbooks for B2B and B2C startups.

communities.name: Product Leaders Circle
communities.description: Invite-only circle for senior PMs and Heads of Product at seed to Series B startups to discuss strategy, org design, and roadmap prioritization.

communities.name: UX for AI Products
communities.description: Designers, PMs, and researchers working on AI-driven products, focused on explainability, trust, and human-centered workflows.

communities.name: Remote-First Operators
communities.description: Operations, people, and engineering leaders building remote-first companies, sharing playbooks on async collaboration and global hiring.

communities.name: Climate Tech Innovators
communities.description: Founders and researchers working on climate-tech solutions across carbon removal, energy, and mobility, with a focus on scalable business models.

communities.name: Female Founders in FinTech
communities.description: A supportive community for women founders and leaders building fintech products, with mentorship circles and investor AMAs.

communities.name: Marketing Ops Collective
communities.description: Marketing operations and rev-ops practitioners sharing systems, tooling, and attribution frameworks for high-growth startups.

communities.name: Early-Stage Founders Hub
communities.description: Generalist hub for pre-seed and seed founders across sectors to share weekly wins, get feedback, and find collaborators.
